'''Denev''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who had a long history of military service. He was a veteran of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], serving as part of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Endor strike team/Legends|strike team]] targeting the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]]. Later, he left the military and served as a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] and [[Captain/Legends|captain]] on [[Caluula Station]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], he fought at [[Battle of Caluula|Caluula Station]] against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
